allies.rationale_text: Scientific-method-evidence-testing gives experimentation the hypothesis and evidence discipline that keeps tests from becoming activity without learning.
allies.source_quote: The fundamental essence of Experimentation is the systematic effort to explore a problem or test a hypothesis to find insight.

allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps experimentation test causality without overgeneralizing a local win beyond the real system interactions.
allies.source_quote: Experimentation relies on understanding causality. Using systems tools like Diagrams of Causal Chain helps organize the variables in a system and reveal how parts interact.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias turns experimentation into hypothesis protection by designing or reading tests to support the favored story.
antagonists.source_quote: Experimentation requires intellectual humility and a willingness to seek out and reconcile disconfirming evidence.

antagonists.rationale_text: Narratives can resist experimental revision by making the expected story feel truer than the observed result.
antagonists.source_quote: experimentation conflicts with narratives (narratives) when compelling stories about expected outcomes resist revision even when experimental results contradict the narrative.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Experimentation conflicts with confirmation-bias when tests are designed or interpreted to confirm the hypothesis rather than genuinely challenge it.
structured_tensions.source_quote: experimentation vs confirmation-bias: experimentation conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when tests are designed or interpreted to confirm the hypothesis rather than genuinely challenge it.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Experimentation conflicts with narratives when compelling stories about expected outcomes resist revision even when experimental results contradict the narrative.
structured_tensions.source_quote: experimentation vs narratives: experimentation conflicts with narratives (narratives) when compelling stories about expected outcomes resist revision even when experimental results contradict the narrative.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on explicit conflict blocks and on the alliance between disciplined testing and causal system understanding, so the file keeps that compact surface.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor relation sprawl beyond the named experimentation, systems, and anti-story conflict set.
open_questions: Feynman-technique and MECE decomposition are source-real allies, but scientific-method-evidence-testing and systems-thinking were the cleaner bounded anchors here.
